ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention strategy */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention strategy (e.g., MDA, IRS, LLINs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention strategy */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time in months since the start of the intervention */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage percentage of the intervention */,
  "regimen" TEXT /* Treatment regimen (e.g., xxx, xIA) */,
  "bednets" INTEGER /* Number of bednets distributed */,
  "adherence" REAL /* Adherence to the treatment regimen */,
  "malaria_prevalence" REAL /* Malaria prevalence in the region */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the intervention period */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Average rainfall during the intervention period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_regimen FOREIGN KEY ("regimen") REFERENCES regimens ("regimen_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regimens" (
  "regimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regimen */,
  "regimen_name" TEXT /* Name of the regimen (e.g., xxx, xIA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regimen */,
  "dosing_schedule" TEXT /* Dosing schedule for the regimen */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the regimen */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the regimen in days */,
  "cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the regimen per patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bednet_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution event */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the distribution */,
  "number_distributed" INTEGER /* Number of bednets distributed */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "distribution_method" TEXT /* Method of distribution */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the community */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the target population that received bednets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bednet_distributions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bednet_distributions_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the distributor */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adherence_rates" (
  "adherence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adherence rate entry */,
  "regimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regimen */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time in months since the start of the intervention */,
  "adherence_rate" REAL /* Adherence rate to the regimen */,
  "reason_for_non_adherence" TEXT /* Common reasons for non-adherence */,
  "intervention_effectiveness" REAL /* Impact of adherence on the effectiveness of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adherence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adherence_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adherence_rates_regimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("regimen_id") REFERENCES regimens ("regimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "malaria_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the cases were reported */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of malaria cases */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention strategy */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_malaria_cases_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_malaria_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "malaria_deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the deaths were reported */,
  "number_of_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of malaria deaths */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention strategy */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deaths */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_malaria_deaths_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_malaria_deaths_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field worker, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the field report */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention strategy */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location where the report was submitted */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location where the report was submitted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Additional feedback or comments from the field worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_reports_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention strategy */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the trial */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial */,
  "trial_design" TEXT /* Design of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health survey */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "number_of_respondents" INTEGER /* Number of respondents in the survey */,
  "malaria_prevalence" REAL /* Malaria prevalence rate */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention strategy */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method of conducting the survey */,
  "survey_design" TEXT /* Design of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_surveys_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_surveys_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., weather, environmental) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the external data */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the external data file */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the external data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effectiveness score */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention strategy */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time in months since the start of the intervention */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the intervention */,
  "impact_on_prevalence" REAL /* Impact of the intervention on malaria prevalence */,
  "impact_on_mortality" REAL /* Impact of the intervention on malaria mortality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_effectiveness_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_effectiveness_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention strategy */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date the cost was incurred */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the intervention */,
  "cost_breakdown" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of costs */,
  "funding_received" REAL /* Amount of funding received for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_costs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_costs_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)
